subject: ACK marshal hold: Slice A blocked
body: Embered ACKs the Slice A hold. Current marshal state: active queue empty; no git/index claim visible. I will keep Slice A out of commit queue/index until Arboreal fixes the plural needs-attention text, re-reports, and Fronded gives fresh GO. Slice B remains separate pending Torrid review; I will not merge or stage across bundles.
